member.name: T:FSBS.Functions.Cognito.PostConfirmationHandler
member.summary: Cognito Post Confirmation Lambda trigger for the fsbs-customer-pool. Fires after a user successfully confirms their sign-up (email code verified). Creates the AppUser and UserProfile rows in the FSBS database.

remarks.para: Trigger source filter: only PostConfirmation_ConfirmSignUp is handled. The PostConfirmation_ConfirmForgotPassword source is ignored because no new user record is needed for a password reset.

Tenant isolation: each private customer receives their own tenant_id (a newly generated GUID). This provides row-level isolation in all tenant-scoped EF global query filters. Staff admin operations that need to see all private customers must call IgnoreQueryFilters().

Database access: uses raw Npgsql rather than EF Core to keep the Lambda package small and avoid the full EF model build at cold-start. The connection string is read from the FSBS_DB_CONNECTION environment variable, which the CDK AppStack injects from Secrets Manager at function creation time.
Idempotency: the insert uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING on the cognito_sub unique index so that Cognito retries do not create duplicate rows.

member.name: T:FSBS.Functions.Cognito.PreSignUpHandler
member.summary: Cognito Pre Sign-up Lambda trigger for the fsbs-customer-pool. Fires before Cognito creates the user record, giving this function the opportunity to allow or block the registration.
member.remarks:
Decision logic:
custom:registration_type == "private" — private customer self-registration. Allowed unconditionally; no invitation token required.
Any other value (or attribute absent) — corporate invitation-based flow. Blocked here until the invitation validation logic is implemented in a future feature. Throwing from this handler causes Cognito to reject the sign-up with a 400 error.
The CDK AppStack wires this function to the customer pool's PreSignUp trigger. It must never be attached to the staff pool.

member.name: T:FSBS.Functions.PostConfirmation.Function
member.summary: Cognito Post Confirmation Lambda trigger. Fires after a user has successfully confirmed their account.
member.remarks:
Responsibilities:
Creates an AppUser record in the database.
Assigns org_id and app_role for customer users.
Marks invitation as Claimed for invitation-based registrations.
Places staff users in the matching Cognito group based on Entra ID groups.
The CDK AppStack wires this function to both the staff and customer pool's PostConfirmation trigger.

member.name: T:FSBS.Functions.PreSignUp.Function
member.summary: Cognito Pre Sign-up Lambda trigger for the fsbs-customer-pool. Fires before Cognito creates the user record, giving this function the opportunity to allow or block the registration.
member.remarks:
Decision logic:
custom:registration_type == "private" — private customer self-registration. Allowed unconditionally; no invitation token required.
Any other value (or attribute absent) — corporate invitation-based flow. Blocked here until the invitation validation logic is implemented in a future feature. Throwing from this handler causes Cognito to reject the sign-up with a 400 error.
The CDK AppStack wires this function to the customer pool's PreSignUp trigger. It must never be attached to the staff pool.

member.name: T:FSBS.Functions.TokenRefresh.Function
member.summary: Cognito Pre Token Generation Lambda trigger for the fsbs-staff-pool. Fires before Cognito generates ID and access tokens.
member.remarks:
Responsibilities:
Re-syncs Cognito group membership from Entra ID groups.
Calls AdminUserGlobalSignOut when Entra account is disabled.
The CDK AppStack wires this function to the staff pool's PreTokenGeneration trigger. It must never be attached to the customer pool.
